literal_meaning: bhikkhus, there are these four floods
preferred_translation: bhikkhus, there are these four floods
definition: A family-heading formula for the four floods.
notes: Use this phrase record when the heading appears as a whole. It should inherit the ogha headword policy and keep the flood image stable across the family.

example_phrases.translation: bhikkhus, there are these four floods
example_phrases.notes: Standard heading for the flood family.
